calendar.matters:
Petition Of Guardian Ad Litem For Payment Of Attorneys Fees And Costs; And Petition For Discharge
Off Calendar May-08-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Avid Alavi, Guardian ad Litem for Ruth Owades.
Lauren Moritz for Gwyn Waters, Power of Attorney Agent for Ruth Owades.
Ruth Owades was present in court.

Ms. Owades expressed surprise at being presented with an invoice for the Guardian ad Litem's services, stating she did not choose the Guardian ad Litem and did not anticipate the cost. The Court clarified that it had appointed Ms. Alavi as Guardian ad Litem to protect Ms. Owades' interests due to her financial circumstances and potential conflicts of interest from other parties and explained that the Probate Code requires it to review the reasonableness of fees charged by the Guardian ad Litem and determined that Ms. Alavi's fees were reasonable.

Ms. Alavi stated that she had spent considerable time working on the case, developed a good working relationship with Ms. Owades, and believed the outcome was in Ms. Owades' best interest. Ms. Moritz indicated that she did not object to the petition.

After discussion, the court took the petition under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

Off Calendar Aug-05-2024 Off Calendar

Louis Lenzen'S Petition That Agent'S Fees And Costs Associated With Defense Of Petition For Order Terminating Louis Lenzen'S Authority As Health Care Agent For Ruth Owades Be Paid By Principal
Off Calendar Aug-05-2024 Continued To Oct-23-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Elizabeth Dorsi for and with Louis Lenzen.
Lauren Moritz appeared by zoom for Gweneth Waters (petitioner/objector).
Avid Alavi (guardian ad litem) appeared by zoom for Ruth Owades.

Status of hiring a case manager is off calendar, and the Petition for Order Terminating Louis Lenzen's Authority as Health Care Agent for Ruth Owades is off calendar as moot. Mrs. Mortiz stated that she still stands on her position that the petition cannot be granted and that they met and conferred, but they did not reach resolution. Discussion was held regarding the issue of whether Mr. Lenzen's fees are appropriate, Mr. Lenzen being kicked out of the home, the issue of whether Mr. Lenzen violated his duties, the hourly rates that are currently being charged by Mrs. Dorsi and Mrs. Moritz, the court not wanting to see Mrs. Owades being taken advantage of by fighting attorneys, it being in Mrs. Owades' best interest to settle this, Mr. Lenzen owing Mrs. Owades money for living expenses, etc. The court stated that it is not happy with this, that Mrs. Owades is where she wants to be now, asked the parties to meet and confer further and come up with an agreement and stated that it is concerned about all of the things that have happened. Louis Lenzen's Petition that Agent's Fees and Costs Associated with Defense of the Petition for Order Terminating Louis Lenzen's Authority as Health Care Agent is continued to October 23, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Pliego. Not reported.

PETITION Petition For Order Terminating Louis Lenzen'S Authority As Health Care Agent For Ruth Owades
Off Calendar Aug-05-2024 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Hiring A Case Manager
Off Calendar Feb-05-2024 Continued To Aug-05-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Louis Lenzen_S Petition That Agent?S Fees And Costs Associated With Defense Of Petition For Order Terminating Louis Lenzen_S Authority As Health Care Agent For Ruth Owades Be Paid By Principal
Off Calendar Feb-05-2024 Continued To Aug-05-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Lauren Moritz, Esq., via zoom for and with Gwyn Waters, via Zoom, Petitioner.
Avid Alavi, Esq., via Zoom, Guardian ad Litem for and with Ruth Owades, in court.
Elizabeth Dorsi, Esq., in court, for and with Louis Lenzen, in court, Respondent.

At the outset, the court confirms with counsel that a case Manager has been hired as of Jan-29-2024. Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions regarding the subject matters. The court suggests continuing the subject matters for six (6) months. Ms. Dorsi offers advocacy for the court to approve her client's petition now, instead of waiting six months. The court offers its reasons for continuing the subject petitions.

After additional discussion, the subject matters are continued to Aug-05-2024 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross. C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

PETITION Petition For Order Terminating Louis Lenzen'S Authority As Health Care Agent For Ruth Owades
Off Calendar Feb-05-2024 Continued To Aug-05-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION Petition For Order Terminating Louis Lenzen'S Authority As Health Care Agent For Ruth Owades
Off Calendar Dec-11-2023 Continued To Feb-05-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Auren Moritz appeared via zoom for and with Gwyn Waters (petitioner).
Avid Alavi appeared in person for and with Ruth Owades.
Elizabeth Dorsi appeared in person for and with Louis Lenzen (respondent).

Discussion was held regarding hiring a case manager, that the caretaker to handle day to day care, that Power of Attorney should be separate duties, and that parties to meet and confer to get the cost capped. Petition for order terminating Louis Lenzen's authority as health care agent etc., is continued to February 05, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Status of hiring a case manager is also added to be heard on the same date.

Judge: Ross Moody: Clerk: Ateesh Datt: Deputy: Wan: Not reported.

PETITION Petition For Order Terminating Louis Lenzen'S Authority As Health Care Agent For Ruth Owades
Off Calendar Oct-30-2023 Continued To Dec-11-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:

Elizabeth A. Dorsi, Esq., and David Hofmayer, Esq., in court, for and with Louis Lenzen, Respondent.

Lauren Moritz, Esq., via Zoom, for Gwyn Waters, Petitioner.

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to the Petition for Order Terminating Authority as Health Care Agent. The court queries counsel regarding appointing counsel or Guardian Ad Litem (GAL) for Ms. Owades. Discussion is held regarding the preceding.

After additional discussion, the subject matter is continued to Dec-11-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Jaime. Not Reported.
